examples.question: Which venue series are associated with papers whose data collection method is survey?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?venue WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method . ?method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type . ?method_type rdfs:label ?method_type_label . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?method_type_label)) = LCASE("survey")) ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . }

examples.question: Which papers report qualitative research data?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data . ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P57038 ?qualitative . }

examples.question: Which data collection method types are reported in papers that use quantitative data?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?method_type WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data . ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P57039 ?quantitative . ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method . ?method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type . }

examples.question: Which statistical techniques are reported in papers that state a null hypothesis?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?technique WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da . ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf . ?inf orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis . ?hypothesis orkgp:P41703 ?htype . ?htype orkgp:P35106 ?null_hypothesis . ?inf orkgp:P35133 ?technique . }

examples.question: Which machine learning algorithms are reported in papers that report accuracy?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?algorithm WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da . ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml . ?ml orkgp:P2006 ?metric . ?metric orkgp:P18048 ?accuracy . ?ml orkgp:P2001 ?algorithm . }

examples.question: In which years were the papers published that describe annotation processes with more than two annotators?
matching_sparql_lines: ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;

examples.question: Which papers report more annotators than data sources?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProc . ?annotationProc orkgp:P181032 ?annotator . ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . FILTER(xsd:decimal(?numAnnotators) > xsd:decimal(?numSources)) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } }

examples.question: Which papers report both an annotation scheme and conflict resolution?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProc . ?annotationProc orkgp:P181036 ?scheme . ?annotationProc orkgp:P181041 ?agreement . ?agreement orkgp:P181044 ?resolution . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } }

examples.question: Which data source domains are reported for datasets that specify both a data item count and a natural language?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer ?answerLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181015 ?dataItems . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType . ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?nl . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181020 ?answer . OPTIONAL { ?answer rdfs:label ?answerLabel } }

examples.question: Which NLP task types are reported in studies that include a release URL?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer ?answerLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?task . ?task orkgp:P181004 ?answer . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url . OPTIONAL { ?answer rdfs:label ?answerLabel } }

examples.question: Which publication years are represented by papers that report survey as the data collection method?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method . ?method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type . ?method_type rdfs:label ?method_type_label . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?method_type_label)) = LCASE("survey")) } ORDER BY ?year

examples.question: Which publication years are represented by papers that report qualitative research data?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data . ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P57038 ?qualitative . } ORDER BY ?year

examples.question: Which publication years are represented by papers that use a machine learning algorithm?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da . ?da orkgp:P57016 ?ml . ?ml orkgp:P2001 ?algorithm . } ORDER BY ?year

examples.question: Which publication years are represented by papers that mention external validity threats?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats . ?threats orkgp:P55034 ?external_validity . } ORDER BY ?year

examples.question: Which publication years are represented by papers published in the IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_label . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venue_label)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) } ORDER BY ?year

examples.question: In which years were the papers published that describe annotation processes with more than two annotators?
matching_sparql_lines: orkgp:P29 ?year .

examples.question: In which year were papers published that report more annotators than data sources?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProc . ?annotationProc orkgp:P181032 ?annotator . ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . FILTER(xsd:decimal(?numAnnotators) > xsd:decimal(?numSources)) }

examples.question: In which year were papers published that use datasets with a URL and a license type?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location . ?location orkgp:P1003 ?url . ?dataset orkgp:license ?lic . ?lic orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType . }

examples.question: In which year were papers published that report a baseline comparison and an evaluation metric?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation . ?evaluation orkgp:P181051 ?bc . ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric . }

examples.question: In which year were papers published that report annotation scheme establishment and guideline availability?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProc . ?annotationProc orkgp:P181036 ?scheme . ?scheme orkgp:P181037 ?establishment . ?scheme orkgp:P181038 ?guideline . }

examples.question: In which year were the datasets produced for contributions that also report a release format and a dependency?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer WHERE { ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181016 ?answer . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat . ?approach orkgp:P181048 ?dependency . }

examples.question: Which NLP task types are reported in studies that include a release URL?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer ?answerLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?task . ?task orkgp:P181004 ?answer . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url . OPTIONAL { ?answer rdfs:label ?answerLabel } }

examples.question: Which algorithms are used in implemented approaches that provide documentation and a release?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer ?answerLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:P58069 ?answer . ?approach orkgp:P41835 ?doc . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . OPTIONAL { ?answer rdfs:label ?answerLabel } }

examples.question: Which release formats are reported for implemented approaches that also specify dependencies?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer ?answerLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:P181048 ?dependency . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P181049 ?answer . OPTIONAL { ?answer rdfs:label ?answerLabel } }

examples.question: What URL is reported for implemented approaches that also provide a release format?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?answer . }

examples.question: How many data items are reported for datasets that are publicly available and have a dataset URL?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer WHERE { ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:license ?license . ?license orkgp:P181026 ?publicAvailability . ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location . ?location orkgp:P1003 ?url . ?dataset orkgp:P181015 ?answer . }

examples.question: What license type is reported for datasets that have a URL?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?answer WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location . ?location orkgp:P1003 ?url . ?dataset orkgp:license ?lic . ?lic orkgp:P181027 ?raw . OPTIONAL { ?raw rdfs:label ?rawLabel } BIND(COALESCE(?rawLabel, STR(?raw)) AS ?answer) }

examples.question: How many distinct data source domains are reported for datasets that have a license type?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?domain) AS ?answer) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:license ?lic . ?lic orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181020 ?domain . }

examples.question: How many papers report a dataset URL and a license type?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?answer) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location . ?location orkgp:P1003 ?url . ?dataset orkgp:license ?lic . ?lic orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType . }

examples.question: In which year were papers published that use datasets with a URL and a license type?
matching_sparql_lines: SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location . ?location orkgp:P1003 ?url . ?dataset orkgp:license ?lic . ?lic orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType . }

examples.question: Which combinations of RE and NLP tasks are most (a)typical?
matching_sparql_lines: OPTIONAL{?NLPTaskType orkgp:description ?NLPTaskTypeDescription .}
